name: tps-calendar-base
description: TPS Calendar Base - Adds calendar view to Obsidian Bases.

scripts.test: node --test scripts/test-tps-contracts.mjs && node --test scripts/test-gcm-event-adapter.mjs && node --test scripts/test-identity-fields.mjs && node --test scripts/test-date-link-preview.mjs && node --test scripts/test-calendar-timezone.mjs && node --test scripts/test-external-calendar-cancellation.mjs && node --test scripts/test-canvas-transform-isolation.mjs && node --test scripts/test-create-snap-and-mobile-open.mjs && node --test scripts/test-new-event-service-creation.mjs && node --test scripts/test-bases-hidden-render-guard.mjs && node --test scripts/test-deleted-link-cleanup.mjs && node --test scripts/test-command-surface.mjs && node --test scripts/test-embed-lifecycle.mjs && npm run build
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
